bug_locations.reason: The exc_info tuple is constructed in the wrong order: (value, type, traceback) instead of the standard (type, value, traceback). This causes errors when the test runner attempts to format the traceback.
Accessing self.contracts[name] without verifying if the name exists raises a KeyError for any unrecognized docstring decorators (e.g., @property or standard Sphinx tags).
If 'args' is empty, re.split(r'\s+', args) returns [''] rather than an empty list, which erroneously passes an empty string as an argument to the contract's constructor.
